items.bio: For the last two decades I've worked in Hollywood at the intersection of storytelling, marketing, psychology, and technology. Recently that has culminated in the creation of a boutique marketing-development agency called Secret Weapon and, Render AI and enterprise-grade AI Creative Suite for media professionals, teams, agencies, and studios.
